reviews.comment:
Pernoctamos ahi, deberian poner un minibar en las habitaciones, pleno verano te dejan agua mineral caliente

(Translated by Google)
We stayed there overnight; they should put a minibar in the rooms. In the middle of summer, they only provide hot mineral water.

reviews.comment:
Muy mala experiencia... atención muy lerda y encima paran para cambiar de turno cuando mínimo había 40 vehículos en espera... una decepción total

(Translated by Google)
Very bad experience... very slow service and on top of that they stopped to change shifts when there were at least 40 vehicles waiting... a total disappointment
